content.text:
# HEARTBEAT.md вҖ” BlueMarlin Tours Agent Health Check

## PERIODIC CHECKS
- Confirm WhatsApp channel is active and responding
- Confirm Telegram channel is active and responding
- Confirm KB file BLUEMARLIN_CW_KB_V5.txt is loaded
- Confirm no pending escalations are unresolved

## IF ANY CHECK FAILS
Notify SR via Telegram immediately with:
- Which check failed
- Timestamp
- Suggested action

## HEARTBEAT RESPONSE
Reply HEARTBEAT_OK if all checks pass and nothing needs attention.
